creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 1.3.0 - release announce is here:
  http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/message.php?msg_id=31144665
- Add BUILD_DEPENDS on bash
- Adjust CONFIGURE_ARGS for two different versions of xorg
- Normalize COMMENT
- Remove LICENSE_FILE for standard licenses
- Unmark MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE

----------

It successfully built without MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE on redports:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130728124300-41961/

Dear committer, please take care of removal of patches
in files directory.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
